title.ko: 표시; 광고; 사인; 라벨 또는 명찰; 시일
title.en: DISPLAYING; ADVERTISING; SIGNS; LABELS OR NAME-PLATES; SEALS

definition.ko: 안내 및 광고 견본 표시 G09F5/00 불변정보를 가진 것 표시 카드, 라벨 또는 태그(TAG); 사인, 문자, 플레이트(PLATE) G09F1/00; 3/00; 7/00 가변정보를 가진 것 : 요소의 조합에 의한 것; 완전한 정보의 이동에 의한 것 G09F9/00; 11/00 조명사인; 조명광고 G09F13/00 삐라 및 광고를 위한 지지체; 패널; 기(BANNER); 상품; 기타 G09F15/00; 17/00; 23/00; 19/00 광고 방법 가동; 청각; 시청각; 기타 G09F21/00; 25/00; 27/00; 19/00

title.ko: 접어 구르기 가능한 또는 유연성 재질의 판지(cardboard) 또는 유사한 전시 카드
title.en: Cardboard or like show-cards of foldable or flexible material
Single substantially-flat cards

title.ko: 꺽어서 접은 카드
title.en: Folded cards

title.ko: 3차원 [3D]으로 구축되는 것 (G09F1/08이 우선)
title.en: to be erected in three dimensions [3D] (G09F0001080000 takes precedence)
wholly or partly imitating the form of an object, e.g. of the article to be advertised
Supports or holders for show-cards
Frames therefor
in the form of legs

title.ko: 라벨, 꼬리표 또는 그것과 비슷하거나 지시하는 수단, 시일 우표 또는 그와 비슷한 스탬프
title.en: Labels, tag tickets, or similar identification or indication means; Seals; Postage or like stamps
Forms or constructions
of security seals

title.ko: 라벨자체의 재료로써 고착 또는 보호된 것, 예. 열 고착에 의한 것(박리 점착층에 의한 것 G09F 3/10)
title.en: to be fastened or secured by the material of the label itself, e.g. by thermo-adhesion (by a separate adhesive layer G09F0003100000)

title.ko: 클램프에 의한 것 (분리할 수 있는 클램프에 의한 것 G09F3/16)
title.en: by clamping action (by separate clamps G09F0003160000)
Fastening or securing by means not forming part of the material of the label itself
by an adhesive layer
by pins, staples, or the like
by strings, straps, chains, or wires
by clamps
Casings, frames, or enclosures for labels
for adjustable, removable, or interchangeable labels
Means for displaying samples
Portable sample cases
Cards of samples; Books of samples

title.ko: 사인, 명찰 또는 번호표, 문자, 숫자 또는 기호판; 패널 또는 보드(전시카드 1/00; 가변정보를 위한 지시장치 9/00, 11/00; 조명사인 및 조명광고 13/00; 고지 도는 포스터용의 보드 및 입간판 15/00)
title.en: Signs, name or number plates, letters, numerals, or symbols; Panels or boards (show-cards G09F0001000000;indicating arrangements for variable information G09F0009000000, G09F0011000000;illuminated signs G09F0013000000;boards for notices or posters G09F0015000000)
Signs, plates, panels, or boards using readily-detachable elements bearing or forming symbols
the elements being secured or adapted to be secured by magnetic means
the elements being secured or adapted to be secured by means of pins and holes
the elements being secured or adapted to be secured by means of grooves, rails, or slits
and slidably mounted
the elements being secured or adapted to be secured by self-adhesion, moisture, suction, slow-drying adhesive, or the like
Constructional features of the symbol-bearing or -forming elements
Letters, numerals, or other symbols, adapted for permanent fixing to a support
Means for attaching signs, plates, panels, or boards to a supporting structure
for adjustably mounting
for rotatably or swingably mounting, e.g. for boards adapted to be rotated by the wind

title.ko: 정보가 개별소자의 선택 또는 조합에 의하여 지지체상에 형성되는 가변정보용의 표시장치(가변정보가 움직이는 지지체상에 영구히 고정되어 있는 것 G09F11/00)
title.en: Indicating arrangements for variable information in which the information is built-up on a support by selection or combination of individual elements (in which the variable information is permanently attached to a movable support G09F0011000000)

title.ko: 필요한 문자가 개개요소를 조합하는 것에 의하여 형성되는 것
title.en: in which the desired character or characters are formed by combining individual elements

definition.ko: 그룹 G09F9/302는 그룹 G09F9/305 ~ G09F9/37에 우선함

title.en: characterised by the form or geometrical disposition of the individual elements

title.ko: 광섬유의 단부가 있는 것 (G09F9/302우선)
title.en: being the ends of optical fibres (G09F0009302000 takes precedence)
being incandescent filaments
being gas discharge devices
being semiconductor devices, e.g. diodes
being liquid crystals
being movable elements
in which the desired character is selected from a number of characters arranged one beside the other, e.g. on a common carrier plate
in which the desired character is selected from a number of characters arranged one behind the other

title.ko: 완전한 정보가 그것을 고정위치로 운반하는 가동지지 체에 영구히 고착되어 있는 가변정보를 위한 지시장치
title.en: Indicating arrangements for variable information in which the complete information is permanently attached to a movable support which brings it to the display position

title.ko: 표시부가 회전체에 고착되어 있는 것, 예. 원통, 스핀들
title.en: the display elements being secured to rotating members, e.g. drums, spindles
the elements being secured to rotating discs

title.ko: 표시부가 굳은 판자 또는 카드에 있는 것(회전 원판상에 있는 것 G09F 11/04)
title.en: the elements being stiff plates or cards (on rotating discs G09F0011040000)

title.ko: 표시부가 가요성 시트인 것(회전 원판상에 있는 것 G09F 11/04)
title.en: the elements being flexible sheets (on rotating discs G09F0011040000)
Electric control therefor
the display elements being carried by endless belts, chains, or the like
the elements being in the form of stiff flaps, boards, cards, or the like
the elements being flexible sheets
Electric control therefor
the display elements being carried by belts, chains, or the like, other than endless
the elements being in the form of stiff flaps, boards, cards, or the like
the elements being flexible sheets
Electric control therefor
the advertising or display material forming part of rotating members, e.g. in the form of perforations, prints, or transparencies on a drum or disc
Electric control therefor
the advertising or display material forming part of a moving band, e.g. in the form of perforations, prints, or transparencies
of an endless band
Electric control therefor
of a band other than endless
Electric control therefor
the display elements being fed one by one from a storage place to a display position
the feeding means comprising belts or chains, e.g. endless belts or chains
the feeding means comprising electromagnets

title.ko: 조명사인; 조명광고(G09F 9/00, G09F 11/00이 우선; 이동식 시각적 광고 G09F 21/00)
title.en: Illuminated signs; Luminous advertising (G09F0009000000, G09F0011000000 take precedence;mobile visual advertising G09F0021000000)
Signs, boards, or panels, illuminated by artificial light sources positioned in front of the insignia
Signs, boards, or panels, illuminated from behind the insignia
using individual cut-out symbols or cut-out silhouettes, e.g. perforated signs
using both translucent and non-translucent layers
using transparencies
using a transparent mirror or other light- reflecting surface transparent to transmitted light whereby a sign, symbol, picture, or other information is visible only when illuminated
Arrangements of reflectors therein
Signs formed of, or incorporating, reflecting elements or surfaces, e.g. warning signs having triangular or other geometrical shape
Edge-illuminated signs
with luminescent surfaces or parts
electroluminescent
using tubes or the like filled with liquid, e.g. bubbling liquid

title.ko: 방전관에 의해서 형성된 사인(선택적 점등에 의한 것 G09F 9/00)
title.en: Signs formed by electric discharge tubes (by selective lighting G09F0009000000)

title.ko: 필라멘트형 램프에 의해서 형성된 사인(선택적 점등에 의한 것 G09F 9/00)
title.en: Signs formed by filament-type lamps (by selective lighting G09F0009000000)
with moving light sources, e.g. rotating luminous tubes
with moving optical part or parts, e.g. mirrors

title.ko: 가동부재와 협동하는 광원이 있는 것, 예. 광원이 닫히기도 하 고 열리기도 하는 셔터를 지니고 있는 것 (광고 또는 표시부재 가 계속적 또는 단속적으로 움직이는 장치 G09F11/00)
title.en: with light sources co-operating with movable members, e.g. with shutters to cover or uncover the light source (apparatus wherein advertising or display material is moved in a continuous or intermittent succession G09F0011000000)
co-operating with rotating screening means
with light sources activated by non-visible radiation
with gas as lighting source
Advertising by fireworks
Boards, hoardings, pillars, or like structures for notices, placards, posters, or the like
Bills, posters, or the like therefor
Flags; Banners; Mountings therefor
Advertising or display means not otherwise provided for
incorporating moving display members
operated by the opening or closing of doors, e.g. shop door
Writing devices
Dolls, faces or other representations of living forms with moving parts
Devices demonstrating the action of an article to be advertised
using special optical effects
displaying different signs depending upon the view-point of the observer
involving the use of mirrors
involving the use of optical projection means, e.g. projection of images on clouds
with colour-mixing effects
Advertising or display means on roads, walls or similar surfaces, e.g. illuminated

title.ko: 이동하는 시각적 광고(시각적과 청각적 광고를 조합한 것 G09F 27/00)
title.en: Mobile visual advertising (combined visual and audible advertising G09F0027000000)
by a carrier person or animal
by land vehicles
by aeroplanes, airships, balloons, or kites
the advertising matter being arranged on the aircraft
illuminated
the advertising matter being towed by the aircraft
illuminated
Sky-writing
by ships or other floating means
illuminated

title.ko: 차량으로 부터 팜플렛(pamphlet) 또는 유사한 광고물을 배포하는 장치(비행기로부터의 것 B64D 1/00)
title.en: Dispensing devices for pamphlets or similar advertising matter from vehicles (from aircraft B64D0001000000)

title.ko: 특수한 물품의 내,외부에 설치된 것, 예. 재떨이, 우체통 (차량의 내, 외부에 설치된 것 G09F21/00)
title.en: Advertising on or in specific articles, e.g. ashtrays, letter-boxes (on or in vehicles G09F0021000000)
the advertising matter being displayed by the operation of the article
illuminated

title.ko: 레스토랑(restaurant), 점포 또는 사무소의 물품과 결합되는 광고재(종이제품에 의한 것 G09F 23/10)
title.en: the advertising matter being combined with articles for restaurants, shops, or offices (on paper articles G09F0023100000)
with tableware
on paper articles, e.g. booklets, newspapers
on toilet paper
on toys, games, puzzles, or similar devices
on clocks, e.g. controlled by the clock mechanism
Audible advertising
Combined visual and audible advertising or displaying, e.g. for public address
